summary.en: Makes quality healthcare affordable and accessible in emerging markets.
summary.zh: 讓新興市場的優質醫療變得平價且容易取得。

highlight.en: Combines affordable health insurance, telemedicine, and a mix of partner and proprietary clinics to serve markets like Nigeria and Egypt.
highlight.zh: 結合平價健康保險、遠距醫療,以及合作與自營診所,服務奈及利亞、埃及等市場。

summary.en: The fast way to build internal tools.
summary.zh: 快速打造內部工具的方法。

highlight.en: Lets teams assemble internal software quickly instead of building admin panels and dashboards from scratch.
highlight.zh: 讓團隊快速組裝內部軟體,不必從零開發後台與儀表板。

summary.en: A one-stop shop for visual content creation.
summary.zh: 視覺內容創作的一站式平台。

highlight.en: Pairs an on-demand marketplace for photography and photo editing with self-service booking and SaaS workflows that automate brands' visual content pipelines.
highlight.zh: 結合隨需攝影與修圖市集、自助預約,以及為品牌自動化視覺內容流程的 SaaS 工作流程。

summary.en: Hosted continuous integration and delivery for mobile apps.
summary.zh: 為行動應用程式提供託管的持續整合與交付服務。

highlight.en: Automates app build, test, and deploy through a visual workflow editor of open-source, shareable steps, with project setup in about 50 seconds.
highlight.zh: 透過視覺化工作流程編輯器與開源、可共享的步驟,自動化應用程式的建置、測試與部署,專案設定約需 50 秒。

summary.en: Decarbonizing the chemicals industry with enzymes and metal catalysts.
summary.zh: 以酵素與金屬催化劑為化學產業去碳化。

highlight.en: Its Bioforge platform produces high-value, biobased and carbon-negative chemicals at costs on par with conventional processes.
highlight.zh: 其 Bioforge 平台以與傳統製程相當的成本,生產高價值、生質來源且負碳的化學品。

summary.en: Banking and payments for businesses in Africa.
summary.zh: 為非洲企業提供銀行與支付服務。

highlight.en: Provides banking and payment services to over 200,000 businesses in Nigeria and the DRC.
highlight.zh: 為奈及利亞與剛果民主共和國超過 20 萬家企業提供銀行與支付服務。

summary.en: Modern employee benefits and health savings account (HSA) provider.
summary.zh: 現代化的員工福利與健康儲蓄帳戶（HSA）供應商。

highlight.en: Aims to simplify benefits administration by pairing HSAs and modern employee benefits with features designed to evolve alongside a growing business.
highlight.zh: 透過 HSA 與現代員工福利,搭配可隨企業成長演進的功能,簡化福利管理。

summary.en: Full-stack fintech and supply chain platform for global trade.
summary.zh: 面向全球貿易的全端金融科技與供應鏈平台。

highlight.en: Offers turnkey procurement, sales, and financing for long-tail MRO products and bulk commodities, serving large corporate and government customers worldwide.
highlight.zh: 為長尾 MRO 產品與大宗商品提供採購、銷售與融資的整套方案,服務橫跨數大洲的大型企業與政府客戶。

summary.en: A modern bill payment platform for African businesses and consumers.
summary.zh: 面向非洲企業與消費者的現代化帳單支付平台。

highlight.en: Simplifies energy and vendor bill payments while using a proprietary Energy Data Service to help lenders make smarter decisions.
highlight.zh: 簡化能源與供應商帳單支付,並以自有的能源數據服務協助放款方做出更明智的決策。

summary.en: Helps healthcare organizations collect more money, faster.
summary.zh: 協助醫療機構更快、更多地收回款項。

highlight.en: Targets the roughly 50% of US out-of-pocket payments never collected, accelerating patient cash flow while cutting collection costs and improving satisfaction.
highlight.zh: 瞄準美國約半數從未收回的自付款項,加速病患現金流,同時降低收款成本並提升滿意度。

summary.en: Automatic data extraction from documents.
summary.zh: 從文件中自動擷取資料。

highlight.en: Builds traceable extraction agents for complex documents like invoices, POs, and clinical files, flagging uncertain cases and learning from corrections.
highlight.zh: 為發票、採購單、臨床文件等複雜文件打造可追溯的擷取代理,標記不確定案例供人工審核並從修正中學習。

summary.en: AI company transforming enterprise physical security to prevent incidents.
summary.zh: 以 AI 改造企業實體安防、防患於未然的公司。

highlight.en: Applies computer vision to existing cameras and sensors for continuous monitoring, going beyond motion detection toward near-human situational awareness.
highlight.zh: 將電腦視覺應用於既有攝影機與感測器以持續監控,超越單純的動態偵測,趨近人類等級的情境判讀。

summary.en: A marketplace for insurance securitization.
summary.zh: 保險證券化的交易市場。

highlight.en: Uses proprietary software and analytics to help insurers securitize risk while opening insurance-linked returns to asset managers and pension funds.
highlight.zh: 運用自有軟體與分析協助保險公司將風險證券化,同時為資產管理者、退休基金等機構開啟與保險連結的報酬機會。

summary.en: Document AI in a single API call.
summary.zh: 一次 API 呼叫即可完成的文件 AI。

highlight.en: Turns receipts, invoices, checks, and bank statements into automated expense tracking and fraud-protected transactions via mobile SDKs and APIs.
highlight.zh: 透過行動 SDK 與 API 將收據、發票、支票與銀行對帳單轉為自動化費用追蹤與防詐交易,無需機器學習專業。

summary.en: Diversified credit infrastructure powering payments across Africa.
summary.zh: 支撐非洲各地支付的多元信貸基礎設施。

highlight.en: Serves over 2 million underbanked users with lending-focused financial services and a debt-as-a-service model linked to agency banks across the continent.
highlight.zh: 以聚焦放貸的金融服務與連結各地代理銀行的「債務即服務」模式,服務超過 200 萬名銀行服務不足的用戶。

summary.en: Mechanical Turk for enterprises.
summary.zh: 為企業打造的 Mechanical Turk。

highlight.en: A fully managed data labeling platform that produces training data for computer vision in autonomous vehicles, drones, and mapping using a 300,000+ workforce.
highlight.zh: 全代管的資料標註平台,以超過 30 萬名標註人力,為自駕車、無人機與地圖繪製產出電腦視覺訓練資料。

summary.en: Shopify for financial services.
summary.zh: 金融服務界的 Shopify。

highlight.en: Provides a plug-and-play API suite and lending tech stack that has enabled around $2B in loan disbursement across more than a million loans in India.
highlight.zh: 提供隨插即用的 API 套件與放貸技術堆疊,在印度促成超過百萬筆貸款、約 20 億美元的放款。

summary.en: Neural interfaces to understand and use nerve data in medicine.
summary.zh: 用於解讀並運用神經數據於醫療的神經介面。

highlight.en: Formerly Cambridge Bio-Augmentation Systems, the company began with prosthetic neural interfaces before broadening its focus to nerve data.
highlight.zh: 前身為 Cambridge Bio-Augmentation Systems,公司由義肢神經介面起步,後擴展至神經數據領域。

summary.en: An AI-powered language tutor in your pocket.
summary.zh: 口袋裡的 AI 語言家教。

highlight.en: Delivers an AI language tutor designed to give learners conversational practice anytime through their phone.
highlight.zh: 提供 AI 語言家教,讓學習者隨時透過手機進行對話練習。

summary.en: Democratizing dermatology with AI.
summary.zh: 以 AI 讓皮膚科普及大眾。

highlight.en: Uses in-house AI trained on a large dataset of acne and scalp images to power personalized, dermatologist-validated MDacne and MDhair treatment kits.
highlight.zh: 以自建、基於大量痤瘡與頭皮影像訓練的 AI,驅動經皮膚科醫師臨床驗證的個人化 MDacne 與 MDhair 療程組合。

summary.en: Additive manufacturing with advanced materials.
summary.zh: 運用先進材料的積層製造。

highlight.en: Says its technology makes 3D printing with advanced thermoplastics 10x cheaper, serving uses from automotive tooling to aircraft interiors and oncology.
highlight.zh: 宣稱其技術讓先進熱塑性塑料的 3D 列印便宜 10 倍,客戶涵蓋汽車模具、飛機內裝乃至外科腫瘤治療。

summary.en: Building a B2B trade marketplace for Africa.
summary.zh: 為非洲打造的 B2B 貿易市集。

highlight.en: A technology-driven trading platform that helps African businesses find partners, source competitive prices, and secure better payment terms across trade.
highlight.zh: 技術驅動的貿易平台,協助非洲企業在國際貿易中尋找夥伴、取得有競爭力的價格並爭取更佳付款條件。

summary.en: Helps doctors answer their toughest clinical questions.
summary.zh: 協助醫師解答最棘手的臨床問題。

highlight.en: Blends AI, medical literature, and physician expertise; founded by siblings while navigating their father's cancer, it is used by over 40,000 US physicians.
highlight.zh: 結合 AI、醫學文獻與醫師專業；由一對手足在父親罹癌治療期間共同創立,目前有超過 4 萬名美國醫師使用。

summary.en: A low-code integration platform for banking.
summary.zh: 為銀行業打造的低程式碼整合平台。

highlight.en: Its Glyue web app lets banks, credit unions, and fintechs quickly build integrations spanning APIs, ETL jobs, file transfers, and event-driven pipelines.
highlight.zh: 其 Glyue 網頁應用讓銀行、信用合作社與金融科技公司快速建置橫跨 API、ETL、檔案傳輸與事件驅動管線的整合。

summary.en: Simple, end-to-end automation for logistics organizations.
summary.zh: 為物流機構提供端到端的簡易自動化。

highlight.en: Its core technology reads any logistics document and outputs a machine-readable format, cutting the manual work created by up to 20 companies per shipment.
highlight.zh: 其核心技術能讀懂任何物流文件並輸出機器可讀格式,削減每筆貨運最多牽涉 20 家公司所產生的人工作業。

summary.en: A leading audio subscription platform for Spanish content and creators.
summary.zh: 領先的西語內容與創作者音訊訂閱平台。

highlight.en: Offers audiobooks, meditations, and audio series in Spanish on a subscription, paying creators per minute listened, targeting 480M native Spanish speakers.
highlight.zh: 以訂閱制提供西語有聲書、冥想與音訊系列,依收聽分鐘數支付創作者報酬,瞄準 4.8 億西語母語者。

summary.en: A remote, automated marketplace for long-term apartment rentals.
summary.zh: 全遠端、自動化的長租公寓市集。

highlight.en: Guarantees landlords' monthly rent and pays up to 12 months upfront, while letting renters tour, apply, and lease fee-free from their phone in minutes.
highlight.zh: 為房東保證月租並預付最多 12 個月租金,同時讓租客數分鐘內即可在手機上看屋、申請並承租,且免手續費。

summary.en: Professional experience, anytime and anywhere.
summary.zh: 隨時隨地的職場實務體驗。

highlight.en: Created the remote Externship, a skill-building work experience easier to scale than internships, powering Externships for over 50,000 students since 2020.
highlight.zh: 打造遠端 Externship,一種比實習更易規模化的技能培養工作體驗,自 2020 年起已為超過 5 萬名學生提供。

summary.en: Electronic medical records for India.
summary.zh: 為印度打造的電子病歷。

highlight.en: Offers an iPad-based application that lets doctors in India digitize all of their patient medical records.
highlight.zh: 提供以 iPad 為基礎的應用程式,讓印度醫師將所有病患病歷數位化。

summary.en: The easiest-to-use payroll for startups.
summary.zh: 最易上手的新創團隊薪資系統。

highlight.en: An all-in-one people platform with easy payroll and compliance tools that help fast-growing teams hire and operate globally from day one.
highlight.zh: 一站式人事平台,以易用的薪資與法遵工具,協助快速成長的團隊從第一天起就能全球招募與營運。

summary.en: Getting kids ready for school in India.
summary.zh: 讓印度的孩子準備好上學。

highlight.en: An ed-tech nonprofit using parent education to expand early childhood development, grown from a small pilot to over 100,000 families with state governments.
highlight.zh: 一家透過家長教育擴展幼兒發展的教育科技非營利組織,已從小型試辦成長到與州政府合作觸及超過 10 萬個家庭。

summary.en: A vertically integrated AI radiology solution for emerging markets.
summary.zh: 為新興市場打造的垂直整合 AI 放射診斷方案。

highlight.en: Connects emerging-market hospitals to a global imaging network with plug-and-play hardware and software built for limited internet, power, and clinicians.
highlight.zh: 以專為網路、電力與臨床人力受限環境設計的隨插即用軟硬體,將新興市場醫院連上全球影像診斷網路。

summary.en: A next-generation mRNA platform to tackle cancer, COVID, and climate.
summary.zh: 對抗癌症、COVID 與氣候問題的次世代 mRNA 平台。

highlight.en: Improves mRNA from first principles, cutting experiments that once took months or years to weeks and from millions to thousands of dollars.
highlight.zh: 從第一原理改良 mRNA,將過去耗時數月至數年的實驗縮短為數週,成本從數百萬美元降至數千美元。

summary.en: Decentralized broadband connectivity.
summary.zh: 去中心化的寬頻連線。

highlight.en: Builds low-cost Wi-Fi infrastructure using a grid of free-space-optics lasers over cities, letting anyone buy one gig of data at a time at an affordable price.
highlight.zh: 以佈設於城市上空的自由空間光學雷射網格建構低成本 Wi-Fi 基礎設施,讓任何人都能以平價一次購買 1GB 流量。

summary.en: Online and in-person kids' activities.
summary.zh: 線上與實體的兒童活動。

highlight.en: Lets parents discover and book children's activities, from exclusive events and classes to camps and museums.
highlight.zh: 讓家長探索並預約兒童活動,涵蓋專屬活動、課程、營隊與博物館。

summary.en: Data integration and insights for state and local governments.
summary.zh: 為州與地方政府提供資料整合與洞察。

highlight.en: A smart city platform that helps governments take a data-driven approach to ensuring safe, stable, and affordable housing.
highlight.zh: 智慧城市平台,協助政府以資料驅動的方式確保安全、穩定且可負擔的住房。

summary.en: AWS for manufacturing.
summary.zh: 製造業的 AWS。

highlight.en: Operated a Brooklyn robotic 3D-printing factory with over 250 printers, making thousands of parts for customers from engineers to Microsoft and Mattel.
highlight.zh: 在布魯克林經營擁有超過 250 台印表機的機器人 3D 列印工廠,為從個人工程師到微軟、美泰兒等客戶生產數千個零件。

summary.en: A blood-testing device for early cancer diagnosis and treatment monitoring.
summary.zh: 用於癌症早期診斷與治療監測的血液檢測裝置。

highlight.en: A medical device company whose blood test isolates and analyzes circulating tumor cells to enable early cancer diagnosis and monitoring.
highlight.zh: 一家醫療器材公司,其血液檢測透過分離並分析循環腫瘤細胞,實現癌症的早期診斷與監測。

summary.en: Automated SEO for startups.
summary.zh: 為新創團隊提供的自動化 SEO。

highlight.en: Positions itself as a trusted agency for growing SEO traffic, serving clients from venture-backed Silicon Valley startups to the Fortune 500.
highlight.zh: 定位為值得信賴的 SEO 成長代理商,客戶從矽谷創投支持的新創到財星 500 大企業。

summary.en: An AI-powered sales development representative you can hire in minutes.
summary.zh: 數分鐘即可雇用的 AI 業務開發代表。

highlight.en: Finds prospects, writes personalized emails, handles objections, and schedules demos, with customers reporting 3x more qualified meetings at half the cost.
highlight.zh: 尋找潛在客戶、撰寫個人化郵件、處理異議並安排產品展示,客戶回報合格會議增加三倍、成本減半。

summary.en: SaaS calendar and messaging for small and medium businesses.
summary.zh: 為中小企業打造的 SaaS 行事曆與訊息工具。

highlight.en: Delivers calendar and messaging software tailored to the scheduling and communication needs of small and medium businesses.
highlight.zh: 提供針對中小企業排程與溝通需求量身打造的行事曆與訊息軟體。

summary.en: Helping retailers discover and shop the best brands.
summary.zh: 協助零售商發掘並採購最佳品牌。

highlight.en: A small-business community where independent brands and retailers connect, transact, and grow together.
highlight.zh: 一個讓獨立品牌與零售商連結、交易並共同成長的小型企業社群。

summary.en: An app that makes data analysis easy for non-technical business users.
summary.zh: 讓非技術背景商業使用者也能輕鬆做資料分析的應用程式。

highlight.en: Aims to put data analysis within reach of business users who lack technical skills, lowering the barrier to working with data.
highlight.zh: 致力讓缺乏技術能力的商業使用者也能進行資料分析,降低使用資料的門檻。

summary.en: Non-profit portfolio managers making it easier to give effectively.
summary.zh: 非營利的捐贈組合管理者,讓有效捐助更容易。

highlight.en: Promotes effective altruism, using high-quality evidence and careful reasoning to help people decide which causes to support and how to do the most good.
highlight.zh: 推廣有效利他主義,運用高品質證據與審慎推理,協助人們決定支持哪些議題並做出最大善益。

summary.en: Quantitative investment in art assets.
summary.zh: 藝術資產的量化投資。

highlight.en: Uses a statistically rigorous model built on auction records and repeat sales to value artworks and offer fund-structured art investing to wealthy individuals.
highlight.zh: 以建立在拍賣紀錄與重複成交資料上的嚴謹統計模型評估藝術品價值,並以基金結構為高淨值人士提供藝術投資管道。

summary.en: A complete fare payment platform for public transportation.
summary.zh: 完整的大眾運輸票務支付平台。

highlight.en: Provides mobile ticketing across over 200 cities in the US and Canada, integrating with trip-planning apps like Transit, Moovit, and Google Maps.
highlight.zh: 在美加超過 200 個城市提供行動票務,並整合 Transit、Moovit 與 Google 地圖等行程規劃應用。

summary.en: Payment request technology and an ecosystem of crypto apps.
summary.zh: 支付請求技術與一套加密貨幣應用生態系。

highlight.en: Lets people and companies pay and get paid in cryptocurrencies, with apps like Request Invoicing enabling proper crypto invoices paid in a click.
highlight.zh: 讓個人與企業以加密貨幣收付款,並透過 Request Invoicing 等應用一鍵發送合規的加密貨幣發票並收款。

summary.en: Insurance distribution infrastructure for mortgage origination.
summary.zh: 用於房貸承作的保險分銷基礎設施。

highlight.en: Integrates with mortgage lenders' core systems to turn the week-long process of obtaining required homeowners insurance into a five-minute digital experience.
highlight.zh: 與房貸放款方核心系統整合,將原本耗時一週的房屋保險投保流程,化為五分鐘的數位化體驗。

summary.en: E-commerce 2.0 selling the best version of everyday essentials.
summary.zh: 販售日常必需品最佳版本的電商 2.0。

highlight.en: A members-only, own-brand store selling only essentials and cutting out middlemen and markups to lower prices while paying producers more.
highlight.zh: 採會員制、只售自有品牌必需品的商店,去除中間商與加價以降低售價,同時付給生產者更多。

summary.en: Customer support as a service.
summary.zh: 客戶支援即服務。

highlight.en: Combines machine intelligence with human supervision to deliver an exceptional customer service experience.
highlight.zh: 結合機器智慧與人工監督,提供卓越的客戶服務體驗。

summary.en: A peer-to-peer delivery network for high-quality video streaming.
summary.zh: 用於高品質影音串流的點對點傳輸網路。

highlight.en: Its P2P CDN offloads bandwidth as viewership grows, reportedly boosting server capacity 20x and cutting rebuffering by 40% for live and on-demand video.
highlight.zh: 其 P2P CDN 隨觀眾增加分流頻寬,據稱可將伺服器容量提升 20 倍,並讓直播與隨選影音的重新緩衝減少 40%。

summary.en: Helps B2C companies learn from every customer interaction.
summary.zh: 協助 B2C 企業從每一次客戶互動中學習。

highlight.en: Makes voice data queryable by analyzing sales and support conversations to surface the phrases that drive successful outcomes.
highlight.zh: 讓語音資料可被查詢,透過分析銷售與支援對話,找出促成成功結果的關鍵話術。

summary.en: Makes every website safe to browse.
summary.zh: 讓每個網站都能安全瀏覽。

highlight.en: Its Native Browser Isolation sandboxes dangerous sites at click time, neutralizing phishing and malware in a safe read-only environment via Apozy Airlock.
highlight.zh: 其原生瀏覽器隔離技術在點擊當下沙箱化危險網站,透過 Apozy Airlock 在安全的唯讀環境中化解釣魚與惡意軟體。

summary.en: Scaling the delivery of genomic services.
summary.zh: 規模化交付基因體服務。

highlight.en: Its HIPAA-compliant, patient-centric platform automates the delivery of genetic services at scale for health systems, clinics, and commercial labs.
highlight.zh: 其符合 HIPAA、以病患為中心的平台,為醫療體系、診所與商業實驗室大規模自動化交付基因服務。

summary.en: One online clinic for every sleep issue.
summary.zh: 解決各種睡眠問題的線上診所。

highlight.en: A digital sleep clinic offering end-to-end care for insomnia, sleep apnea, and more, built with sleep experts to address root causes rather than symptoms.
highlight.zh: 數位睡眠診所,為失眠、睡眠呼吸中止等提供端到端照護,與睡眠專家共同打造,從根本而非症狀著手。

summary.en: Uber for kids.
summary.zh: 兒童版的 Uber。

highlight.en: Offered an on-demand ride service designed specifically to transport children.
highlight.zh: 提供專為接送兒童設計的隨需乘車服務。

summary.en: The easiest way to set appointments with real estate leads.
summary.zh: 與房地產潛在客戶約定見面的最簡單方式。

highlight.en: Streamlines converting real estate leads into booked appointments for agents.
highlight.zh: 為房仲簡化將房地產潛在客戶轉化為已預約見面的流程。

summary.en: Flexible printed OLED displays.
summary.zh: 可撓式印刷 OLED 顯示器。

highlight.en: Uses graphic-media printing methods to produce paper-thin, flexible OLED displays that can be custom printed onto curved surfaces in varied shapes and sizes.
highlight.zh: 運用印刷媒體的製程生產紙薄、可撓的 OLED 顯示器,能客製印製於曲面並做成各種形狀與尺寸。

summary.en: Predicting job applicant performance for entry-level support roles.
summary.zh: 預測入門級客服職位求職者的表現。

highlight.en: Builds pre-employment assessments that accurately simulate the actual work applicants will do on the job.
highlight.zh: 打造能準確模擬求職者實際工作內容的職前評測。

summary.en: Helps doctors share clinical data and transfer medical records.
summary.zh: 協助醫師分享臨床資料並傳輸病歷。

highlight.en: Modernizes how medical records move between patients, doctors, and insurers, replacing the fax and courier methods that still dominate today.
highlight.zh: 改造病歷在病患、醫師與保險公司之間的傳輸方式,取代至今仍主導的傳真與快遞做法。

summary.en: A biometric sign-in and identity verification platform.
summary.zh: 生物辨識登入與身分驗證平台。

highlight.en: Lets businesses onboard, verify IDs, authenticate, and continuously verify users' credentials and identities in one place.
highlight.zh: 讓企業在單一平台完成用戶引導、身分證件驗證、認證與持續的憑證與身分驗證。

summary.en: At-home blood testing to measure, analyze, and enhance care.
summary.zh: 在家進行血液檢測,量測、分析並提升照護。

highlight.en: Its HomeLab device delivers clinical-grade blood test reports into EMR, LIMS, or EDC systems, with software that guides therapy prescription and dosing.
highlight.zh: 其 HomeLab 裝置將臨床級血液檢測報告直接傳入 EMR、LIMS 或 EDC 系統,並以軟體指引用藥處方與劑量。

summary.en: An app that turns selfies into hundreds of personalized emoji.
summary.zh: 將自拍照變成數百個個人化表情符號的應用程式。

highlight.en: Its Mirror Emoji Keyboard takes a photo of your face and generates a set of personalized emoji ready to share on messengers and social networks.
highlight.zh: 其 Mirror 表情鍵盤拍下你的臉,生成一組可在通訊軟體與社群網路分享的個人化表情符號。

summary.en: HD maps for self-driving cars.
summary.zh: 為自駕車打造的高精度地圖。

highlight.en: Builds high-definition maps to support the navigation needs of autonomous vehicles.
highlight.zh: 打造高精度地圖,以支援自駕車的導航需求。

summary.en: Outbound call professionals as a service.
summary.zh: 外撥電話專員即服務。

highlight.en: Gives companies 24/7 access to thousands of vetted US callers plus tools like script templates, call analytics, and CRM integrations to run call campaigns.
highlight.zh: 讓企業全天候取得數千名經審核的美國電話專員,並提供腳本範本、通話分析與 CRM 整合等工具來執行外撥活動。

summary.en: Connecting products to the internet with an invisible, chip-less tag.
summary.zh: 以隱形、無晶片的標籤將產品連上網路。

highlight.en: Its printable tag can be scanned with any phone via API and is added by legacy commercial printers, claiming to be 10x cheaper and more scalable than NFC.
highlight.zh: 其可印製標籤能透過 API 以任何手機掃描,並由既有商業印表機加印,號稱比 NFC 便宜 10 倍且更易規模化。

summary.en: An on-demand procurement concierge for sourcing from China.
summary.zh: 從中國採購的隨需採購禮賓服務。

highlight.en: Connects buyers' product requests to a network of verified vendors and delivers quotes directly to them.
highlight.zh: 將買家的產品需求對接到一個經驗證的供應商網路,並將報價直接送達買家。

summary.en: Enabling T cell immunotherapy discovery, development, and manufacturing.
summary.zh: 推動 T 細胞免疫療法的研究、開發與製造。

highlight.en: Develops a non-viral delivery system using microfluidic vortex shedding to rapidly deliver nucleic acids and gene-editing complexes into T cells.
highlight.zh: 開發以微流體渦流脫落為基礎的非病毒胞內遞送系統,以最小擾動將核酸與基因編輯複合物快速送入 T 細胞。

summary.en: An operating system for agriculture.
summary.zh: 農業的作業系統。

highlight.en: Combines machine learning with weather, satellite, and historical data to help specialty-crop farmers forecast yield more accurately and cut waste.
highlight.zh: 結合機器學習與氣象、衛星及歷史資料,協助特用作物農戶更準確預測產量並減少浪費。

summary.en: Transforming battery manufacturing to make EV batteries safer and cheaper.
summary.zh: 改造電池製造,讓電動車電池更安全、更便宜。

highlight.en: Its spray-on SafeCoat separator is deposited directly onto electrodes, claiming to cut fire risk by 99%, reduce scrap by 70%, and save $350M per 40GWh factory.
highlight.zh: 其噴塗式 SafeCoat 隔離膜直接沉積於電極上,號稱可降低 99% 起火風險、減少 70% 廢料,並為每座 40GWh 工廠節省 3.5 億美元。

summary.en: Boeing for electric planes.
summary.zh: 電動飛機界的波音。

highlight.en: Designing the Wright 1, a 186-passenger electric plane for routes like LA-SF and London-Paris, working with airlines including easyJet and VivaAerobus.
highlight.zh: 正設計可載 186 名乘客、用於洛杉磯-舊金山及倫敦-巴黎等航線的 Wright 1 電動飛機,並與 easyJet、VivaAerobus 等航空公司合作。

summary.en: An ML platform for developing, training, and deploying models.
summary.zh: 用於開發、訓練與部署模型的機器學習平台。

highlight.en: A platform-as-a-service for training and deploying deep learning models in the cloud, handling the grunt work so developers can focus on their problem.
highlight.zh: 用於在雲端訓練與部署深度學習模型的平台即服務,代勞繁瑣工作,讓開發者專注於問題本身。

summary.en: Automatically extracts insights from customer service conversations.
summary.zh: 自動從客服對話中擷取洞察。

highlight.en: Uses natural language processing to tag and analyze support conversations for feedback trends, integrating with Zendesk, Intercom, and Desk.com.
highlight.zh: 運用自然語言處理標記並分析支援對話以找出回饋趨勢,並整合 Zendesk、Intercom 與 Desk.com。

summary.en: Building Africa's commodity exchange.
summary.zh: 打造非洲的大宗商品交易所。

highlight.en: Connects buyers, sellers, and transporters of commodities in Ghana, cutting out middlemen while weighing and grading every bag and accepting rejected returns.
highlight.zh: 連結迦納大宗商品的買家、賣家與運輸者,去除中間商,並為每袋商品秤重分級、接受被退回的貨。

summary.en: Join tennis leagues and play competitively with people nearby.
summary.zh: 加入網球聯賽,與附近的人競技對打。

highlight.en: Its Rally Tennis app helps players compete in leagues, find practice partners, and play more tennis through a simple mobile experience.
highlight.zh: 其 Rally Tennis 應用透過簡單的行動體驗,協助球友參加聯賽、尋找練習夥伴並打更多網球。

summary.en: Making the JVM faster.
summary.zh: 讓 JVM 跑得更快。

highlight.en: Analyzes JVM bytecode and applies provably safe optimizations like automatic parallelization, already delivering up to 10x speedups on some workloads.
highlight.zh: 分析 JVM 位元組碼並套用可證明安全的最佳化（如自動平行化），在部分工作負載上已帶來最高 10 倍的加速。

summary.en: Portable, affordable, beautiful smart homes.
summary.zh: 可移動、平價且美觀的智慧住宅。

highlight.en: Inspired by modular shipping containers, it builds sustainable, portable houses ranging from minimal to a luxe edition with wheels, solar, and full utilities.
highlight.zh: 受模組化貨櫃啟發,打造永續、可移動的住宅,從極簡款到附輪子、太陽能與完整水電的豪華版皆有。

summary.en: A Fitbit for dairy cows that delivers data-driven herd alerts.
summary.zh: 乳牛版 Fitbit,提供資料驅動的牛群警示。

highlight.en: A neck collar measures temperature, activity, and behavior, sending farmers actionable alerts to boost reproduction, detect disease, and improve milk yield.
highlight.zh: 頸圈量測體溫、活動與行為,向農戶發送可行動的警示,以提升繁殖率、偵測疾病並改善產乳量。

summary.en: MailChimp for SMS.
summary.zh: 簡訊版的 MailChimp。

highlight.en: Provides SMS marketing and messaging tools, bringing an email-campaign-style experience to text messaging.
highlight.zh: 提供簡訊行銷與訊息工具,將電子郵件行銷活動般的體驗帶到簡訊上。

summary.en: Solving intelligence for investment management.
summary.zh: 為投資管理破解智慧難題。

highlight.en: Combines AI research with heavy computing to mine profitable trading strategies, detecting market inefficiencies rather than testing human ideas.
highlight.zh: 結合 AI 研究與強大算力挖掘可獲利的交易策略,主動偵測市場無效率,而非驗證人為發想的構想。

summary.en: A smart target for shooting sports.
summary.zh: 射擊運動的智慧標靶。

highlight.en: Makes smart shooting targets that light up on impact and connect to a smartphone for real-time analytics and games.
highlight.zh: 製造命中時會發光的智慧射擊標靶,並連接智慧型手機提供即時分析與遊戲。

summary.en: The universal API.
summary.zh: 通用 API。

highlight.en: A GraphQL-as-a-service platform bundling push notifications, analytics, file storage, and custom code so developers can build mobile, web, and IoT apps.
highlight.zh: GraphQL 即服務平台,整合推播、分析、檔案儲存與自訂程式碼,讓開發者打造行動、網頁與物聯網應用。

summary.en: A social community for Black women's hairstyles.
summary.zh: 黑人女性髮型的社群。

highlight.en: A mobile app to discover and share hairstyles, including details like the salon, hair products used, and cost so women can find and replicate looks.
highlight.zh: 一款探索與分享髮型的行動應用,並附上沙龍、所用髮品與費用等細節,讓女性得以尋找並複製造型。

summary.en: Crystallized coffee made from specialty beans.
summary.zh: 以精品咖啡豆製成的結晶咖啡。

highlight.en: Hand-brews coffee from specialty producers and turns it into instant coffee; it was featured in The New York Times, Food & Wine, and CNBC.
highlight.zh: 以精品產區的咖啡豆手沖後製成即溶咖啡,曾獲《紐約時報》、《Food & Wine》與 CNBC 報導。

summary.en: Sends expert auto mechanics to your home for repairs.
summary.zh: 派遣專業汽車技師到府維修。

highlight.en: Offers on-demand auto repair at clients' homes or offices, covering everything from batteries and brakes to engines, suspension, and transmission.
highlight.zh: 在客戶住家或辦公室提供隨需汽車維修,涵蓋電瓶、煞車乃至引擎、懸吊與變速箱等項目。

summary.en: A Keurig for healthy smoothies.
summary.zh: 健康果昔版的 Keurig。

highlight.en: Its office kiosk lets employees turn pre-packed freezer pods into fresh smoothies in 30 seconds, using the machine as a Trojan horse for in-office commerce.
highlight.zh: 其辦公室機台讓員工 30 秒內將冷凍預裝包做成新鮮果昔,並以這台機器作為辦公室零售商務的切入點。

summary.en: Makes tracking your finances as easy as a conversation.
summary.zh: 讓理財追蹤像對話一樣簡單。

highlight.en: A personal finance app that chats with users about income and spending, forecasting next month, flagging upcoming bills, and helping cancel unused services.
highlight.zh: 一款個人理財應用,透過對話與用戶討論收支、預測下個月、提醒即將到期帳單,並協助取消未使用的服務。

summary.en: A marketplace to add a delivery driver in five minutes.
summary.zh: 五分鐘內增補外送司機的媒合市集。

highlight.en: Focuses on clear, up-to-date earnings information for contractors so drivers can choose the jobs that maximize their pay.
highlight.zh: 聚焦為承包司機提供清楚、即時的收入資訊,讓司機能挑選收入最高的工作。

summary.en: Software-enabled, self-serve retail kiosks.
summary.zh: 由軟體驅動的自助零售機台。

highlight.en: Supplies the kiosk, products, and software while hosts provide only the space and receive a monthly share of the profits.
highlight.zh: 提供機台、商品與軟體,場地方只需出場地,即可按月分得利潤。

summary.en: An app providing checking services for unbanked workers.
summary.zh: 為無銀行帳戶勞工提供支票帳戶服務的應用程式。

highlight.en: A digital wallet for underbanked Americans that lets users cash paychecks, send money to 90 countries, and use a debit card at any store or ATM.
highlight.zh: 為銀行服務不足的美國人打造的數位錢包,讓用戶兌現薪資支票、匯款至 90 個國家,並以簽帳金融卡在任何商店或 ATM 使用。
